expectations.text: Response acknowledges completion with genuine enthusiasm (not a form-letter congratulations)
expectations.evidence: 'Eight lessons. Done. That's actually significant — most people who start something like this don't finish it.'

expectations.text: Response asks about going deeper on a specific topic OR applying something to their workflow
expectations.evidence: 'Is there one thing from the course you want to go deeper on? Or one thing you're going to try in your real workflow this week?'

expectations.text: Response does NOT suggest restarting lessons
Response does NOT provide a summary or recap of all 8 lessons
expectations.evidence: Includes a numbered 1-8 recap of all lesson topics before the closing question.

expectations.text: Response is brief — 3-5 sentences, not a lengthy graduation speech
expectations.evidence: Response is ~15 sentences including the 8-item recap list.
